rationale: Both runs' forall ensures share the same triggers but instantiate against disjoint post-state instances, so z3 never lines them up; the prelude re-asserts each forall ensures of run-1 and run-2 to force trigger firing, then derives cross-run pointwise equalities (via case splits on target_proc_ptr / owning_pre / shared_addr) and lifts them to structural (=~=) equalities on get_address_space, get_proc, get_thread, get_container, get_endpoint, get_container_owned_pages, page_mapping@, page_is_mapped, and the physical-page reference counter so z3 can discharge det_create_entry_and_share_equal.
